chainid_guard: block.chainid == 545 (Flow EVM testnet) — adminResetSlot reverts on any other chain
new_event: AdminSlotReset(address indexed user, uint256 priorCommitmentX, uint256 priorCommitmentY)
privacy_warning: PRIVACY-BREAKING — testnet-only commitment reset. AdminSlotReset event leaks prior commitment point. Homomorphic invariant (totalSupplyCommitment == sum(commitments)) is intentionally NOT preserved.

verification.method: ERC1967 Upgraded(address) event from upgrade tx receipt (Flow EVM eth_getStorageAt does not expose the ERC1967 impl slot — returns 0x0 even when set, so the receipt event is the authoritative on-chain signal)
verification.admin_reset_selector_revert_reason: OwnableUnauthorizedAccount (expected — address(1) is not owner; confirms selector is now on proxy)
